Description: Login with valid credentials succeeds and header reflects logged-in state
Steps: 1. Open sign-in page (or modal for Vans) 2. Enter valid email + password 3. Submit
Expected Result: User is logged in; redirected to account dashboard or homepage; header shows logged-in state.
Notes: Vans: login is modal popup — see MA-van-001

Description: Logout redirects and header reflects logged-out state
Expected Result: User is logged out; redirected to homepage or login; header shows guest state.

Description: Protected account page redirects guest user to login
Steps: 1. Attempt to directly navigate to /account or /account/orders
Expected Result: User is redirected to login page or access is blocked; account content not exposed.

Description: Password can be changed with the correct current password
Steps: 1. Open Change Password section 2. Enter current password 3. Enter new valid password 4. Confirm 5. Save
Expected Result: Password updated successfully; success message shown.
Notes: Use a dedicated test account with known credentials to avoid locking real users

Description: Login with invalid password shows error and does not log user in
Steps: 1. Enter valid email + wrong password 2. Submit
Expected Result: Error message displayed; user remains on login page/modal.

Description: Login required field validation shown when submitting empty form
Steps: 1. Submit login form with empty email + password
Expected Result: Required field validation messages visible; user not logged in.

Description: Account dashboard loads with customer name or email visible
Steps: 1. Log in 2. Open My Account dashboard
Expected Result: Dashboard loads; customer name or email visible; no broken layout.

Description: Account navigation links (Orders / Address Book / Account Details) are visible and navigable
Preconditions: User is logged in; account dashboard open
Steps: 1. Open My Account 2. Inspect navigation 3. Click each nav link
Expected Result: All account nav links visible; each link opens the correct account section.

Description: Forgot password link opens the password reset form
Steps: 1. Open login page/modal 2. Click Forgot Password
Expected Result: Forgot password form displayed with email input; confirmation message shown after submitting.
Notes: Do NOT use real account email — just verify form renders and accepts submission

Description: Order history page loads (list or empty state) without error
Expected Result: Order history page loads; either order list OR empty-state message visible; no broken layout.

Description: A new address can be saved in the address book
Steps: 1. Open Address Book 2. Click Add New Address 3. Fill valid AU/NZ address 4. Save
Expected Result: Address is saved; appears in address list.
Test Data: Test address data (AU postcode or NZ postcode)

Description: User remains logged in after page refresh
Expected Result: User still logged in; header still shows logged-in state.

Description: Registration page/form is accessible and required field validation works
Steps: 1. Open registration page 2. Submit empty form
Expected Result: Required field validation messages shown; account NOT created.
Notes: Full registration avoided in automation to prevent test account accumulation; field validation is the meaningful assertion

Description: Order detail page opens correctly from order history list
Preconditions: User is logged in; account has previous orders
Steps: 1. Open Order History 2. Click on an order
Expected Result: Order details page opens; order number visible; product/line items shown.
Notes: @data-dependent — requires account with prior order history

Description: Invalid email format on login form shows validation message
Steps: 1. Enter malformed email (e.g. 'not-an-email') + any password 2. Submit
Expected Result: Email format validation message displayed; user not logged in.

Description: My Account page loads on mobile and navigation works
Steps: 1. Log in on mobile 2. Open My Account 3. Tap a navigation link
Expected Result: Account page loads; mobile nav accessible; selected section opens.

Description: Vans login and signup open as a modal popup overlay — not a page navigation
Preconditions: Vans project; user NOT logged in
Steps: 1. Click account icon in Vans header
Expected Result: Login/signup modal overlay appears in the viewport; URL does NOT change to /account/login or a new login page.
Notes: Unique to Vans — all other brands navigate to a dedicated login page

Description: Vans Qantas QFF account page is accessible from My Account
Preconditions: Vans project; user is logged in
Steps: 1. Log in 2. Navigate to /qantas-frequent-flyer or find QFF link in account
Expected Result: Qantas QFF account page loads; QFF section content visible.
